name: Gentle Pomodoro

releases.author: JamieStudio-lab
releases.description:
UI polish release — 17 commits of in-view redesign and responsive improvements.

## Settings panel redesign

The gear panel inside the timer view got a full pass:

- **iOS-style toggle switches** replace native checkboxes for Sound, Auto-start break, and Auto-start focus.
- **Low / Mid / High segmented control** replaces the volume slider (maps to 0.3 / 0.7 / 1.0). Existing arbitrary float values snap to the nearest segment on the first render.
- **Section headers** — TIMING / AUDIO / AUTO-START — group related rows for cleaner scanning.
- **Reset to defaults** button at the bottom restores in-view-controlled settings only (focus/break minutes, sound, volume, auto-start) without touching paths or feature toggles.
- Number inputs commit on Enter, not just on blur.
- All controls share a uniform 32px height and right-edge alignment.

## Responsive layout

The view now behaves predictably across any sidebar size:

- **Sticky timer visual** keeps the focus block + time number pinned at the top while you scroll through settings or tasks.
- **Leaf-level horizontal scrolling** on narrow sidebars — the whole side panel scrolls as a unit instead of buttons shrinking or each row getting its own scrollbar.
- **Settings panel caps at 320px** and scrolls internally past that, regardless of leaf size.
- **Day/night indicator auto-fades** when the side panel drops below 200px wide.
- **Clock floors at 200×200** (max 220) so it never shrinks past readable.
- **Leaf min-height 320px** — the resize divider stops shrinking past usable size.
- **Controls/settings/tasks locked at 260px** — they never shrink; you scroll horizontally to see the right edge on a narrow sidebar.

releases.author: JamieStudio-lab
releases.description:
Patch release rolling up the Obsidian catalog auto-check fixes from 0.1.0 plus one small a11y addition.

## Fixes

- **Audio cues now work out of the box for catalog / BRAT installs.** The three mp3 cues (war drum, bell, ding) are bundled into `main.js` as base64 data URLs at build time — no separate audio files in the plugin folder needed. `main.js` grew from ~300 KB to ~800 KB to accommodate.
- **Release artifacts signed.** Both `main.js` and `styles.css` now carry a sigstore artifact attestation, surfacing as a "Verified" badge next to each download.
- **CSS lint cleanup.** Removed the `ui-rounded` font keyword (unsupported by Obsidian's bundled Chromium), removed redundant `font-size` fallbacks before `clamp()`, and dropped `!important` in favor of selector specificity. Zero visual impact.
- **Reproducible builds.** Committed `package-lock.json` and switched CI/release workflows to `npm ci` so the install step locks every transitive dep version.

## Accessibility

- **`prefers-reduced-motion` respect.** Users with the system setting enabled now get a static timer shape — the gentle-pulse (focus/break) and breathing-glow (overtime) animations are disabled.

releases.author: JamieStudio-lab
releases.description:
## Highlights

- **Long break after N pomodoros** — Pomodoro Technique compliance. Every Nth focus session (default 4) replaces the short break with a long one (default 15 min). Configurable in *Settings → Long break*.
- **Daily focus goal** — set a target (default 2h) and the status bar shows `Today 1h 12m / 2h`, turning green when met. A one-time "goal hit" notice fires the first time you cross the line each day. Resets at local midnight.
- **Per-task pomodoro counter** *(opt-in)* — each finished focus session appends or increments `🍅 N` on the linked task's line. Lifetime total per task. Enable via *Settings → Task integration → Increment task pomodoro count on finish*.
- **In-view UI controls** — volume slider plus auto-start break and auto-start focus toggles now live in the timer's gear panel.

## Log schema addition

Daily-log lines gain a `Type::` field at the end: `focus`, `short-break`, or `long-break`. Existing fields and their order are unchanged — Dataview queries continue to work.

```md
- 🍅 Focus | Task:: [[Path|Name]] | ID:: abcd12 | Start:: … | End:: … | Scheduled:: 1500 | Pauses:: [] | Total:: 1500 | Status:: finished | Type:: focus
- ☕ Rest | Start:: … | End:: … | Scheduled:: 300 | Total:: 300 | Type:: short-break
- ☕ Rest | Start:: … | End:: … | Scheduled:: 900 | Total:: 900 | Type:: long-break
```

## Under the hood

- 64 unit tests (Vitest) covering the timer state machine, log formatting, and task parsing.
- CI workflow runs lint + format-check + test + build on every push.
- Tag-triggered Release workflow auto-publishes `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css`.
- TypeScript 5 / Rollup 4 toolchain bump; Prettier + typed ESLint rules.
- Internal refactors: extracted `icons.ts` and `logger.ts`; de-duplicated task loading via `taskLoader`; status-bar state collapsed; `onLayoutReady` for auto-open.

releases.author: JamieStudio-lab
releases.description:
This release focuses on bringing more clarity with new status indicators, a cleaner task interface, and a significant backend refactor for a smoother experience.

## New Features

- Keep track of your progress at a glance. Includes current status, a toggleable "time remaining" display (click to show/hide), and your total focus time for the day. 
- Added a subtle Day/Night indicator on the timer to provide context for the shifting color themes. 
- Improved Pomodoro logging. The plugin now reads task IDs directly from your list, ensuring logs stay accurate even if you rename your tasks.
- Add a new set of commands. Search for and activate them in the Obsidian command list using `CMD+P` or `CTR+P`. 

## UX Improvements

- Refined the settings menu transitions for a more fluid feel.
- Streamlined the current task list to display only task names and priorities, reducing visual clutter while you work. 

## Performance Enhancements

- Refactored `main.ts` into functional modules, making the codebase easier to maintain and extend.
- Removed redundant logic and patched potential bugs to improve overall plugin stability.

## Configuration

Go to Settings > Gentle Pomodoro to customize:

- Log Folder: Choose where daily logs are saved (default: /Pomodoro_logs).
- Task Folder: Limit the task search to a specific folder (e.g., exclude your Archive).
- Toggle whether the timer view opens automatically when Obsidian starts.
- Customize your UI by showing/hiding the status bar and day-night indicators.

## How to Install

### Manual (Recommended)

- Download the `zip` file below.
- Obsidian settings --> Community plugins --> Turn off "Restrict mode"
- Open the plugin folder (icon on the right side of "Installed plugins")
- Decompress the zip file to the plugin folder
- Refresh the plugin list, turn the plugin on, and enjoy!

### BRAT

Since this is a beta release, it is not yet in the official community list. You can install it using [BRAT] (https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-brat):

- Install the BRAT plugin from the Obsidian Community Plugins list.
- Open BRAT settings and click "Add Beta plugin".
- Paste this repository URL: `https://github.com/JamieStudio-lab/obsidian-gentlepomodoro`
- Click Add Plugin.
- Enable "Gentle Pomodoro" in your Community Plugins list.
- Open the plugin folder, and drag all three MP3 files in.

releases.author: JamieStudio-lab
releases.description:
This update focuses on reducing visual clutter and improving the "gentle" atmosphere with new ambient sounds and smoother interactions. 

## Visual Polish  

- Cleaner Timer: Removed the countdown progress ring to eliminate visual noise and color artifacts. 
- Dynamic Shadows: The timer’s glow now dynamically adapts to the timer color.  
- Better Button Showing: Controls now fade in and out based on context.  
- Transitions: Buttons now use smooth fade animations when appearing/disappearing. 

## Immersive Sound 

- New Soundscapes: Replaced "tedious" alerts with game-ambient sounds. 
  - Singing Bells: For a soothing finish. 
  - War Drums: For a powerful start. 

## Workflow Improvements

- Better Reset Logic: Clicking `Reset` now restores the timer duration without terminating your current logging session.  
- Task List Cleanup:
  - Completed tasks now automatically unlink when a session finishes, keeping your list fresh.
  - The currently selected task is now highlighted for better visibility. 

## Other Improvements

- Removed unused code (`cancel()` method and progress ring) for better performance. 
- Updated README.md. 

## Configuration
Go to Settings > Gentle Pomodoro to customize:

Log Folder: Choose where daily logs are saved (default: /Pomodoro_logs).
Task Folder: Limit the task search to specific folders (e.g., exclude your Archive). 

## How to Install 

### Manual (Recommended)

- Download the zip file below.
- Obsidian settings --> Community plugins --> Turn off "Restrict mode" 
- Open the plugin folder (icon on the right side of "Installed plugins") 
- Decompress the zip file to the plugin folder
- Refresh the plugin list, turn the plugin on, and enjoy!

### BRAT

Since this is a beta release, it is not yet in the official community list. You can install it using [BRAT](https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-brat): 

- Install the BRAT plugin from the Obsidian Community Plugins list. 
- Open BRAT settings and click "Add Beta plugin". 
- Paste this repository URL: https://github.com/JamieStudio-lab/obsidian-gentlepomodoro 
- Click Add Plugin. 
- Enable "Gentle Pomodoro" in your Community Plugins list. 
- Open the plugin folder, and drag all three MP3 files in.
releases.name: 0.0.4 Beta

releases.author: zhanmingchen
releases.description: This is the first public beta release of **Gentle Pomodoro**, a visually soothing and task-integrated timer for Obsidian. ## ✨ Features ### 🍅 Ambient Visual Timer Instead of a stressful ticking clock, Gentle Pomodoro uses a calming visual approach: - Soothing Transitions: A shape that gently pulses and transitions colors (Day → Dusk → Night) as your session progresses. - Overtime Mode: When the timer ends, it counts up gently with a soft glow, letting you know you are in overtime without breaking your flow. > Note: As this is a beta release, feedback is highly appreciated! ### ✅ Task Integration Stop toggling between apps. - Select Tasks: Pick tasks directly from your vault (compatible with the - [ ] Task format). - Smart Context: The timer links your focus session to the specific file where the task lives, so you can jump right back to your work. ### 📊 Pomodoro Logging (Dataview Compatible) The plugin now automatically generates daily logs (e.g., `2025-12-23-gentle-pomodoro-log.md`) in your configured folder. - Detailed Metrics: Tracks Start/End times, Scheduled duration vs. Actual duration. - Pause Tracking: Intelligently calculates total focus time by subtracting pause durations. - Dataview Ready: Logs are written using inline fields for easy querying: ```md - 🍅 Focus | Task:: [[Project.md|My Task]] | Start:: ... | End:: ... | Status:: finished ``` ## ⚙️ Configuration Go to Settings > Gentle Pomodoro to customize: - Log Folder: Choose where daily logs are saved (default: /Pomodoro_logs). - Task Folder: Limit the task search to specific folders (e.g., exclude your Archive). ## 📥 How to Install (Beta) Since this is a beta release, it is not yet in the official community list. You can install it using [BRAT](https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-brat): 1. Install the BRAT plugin from the Obsidian Community Plugins list. 2. Open BRAT settings and click "Add Beta plugin". 3. Paste this repository URL: https://github.com/JamieStudio-lab/obsidian-gentlepomodoro 4. Click Add Plugin. 5. Enable "Gentle Pomodoro" in your Community Plugins list. --- *Found a bug? Have a suggestion? Please report it in the [Issues](https://github.com/JamieStudio-lab/obsidian-gentlepomodoro/issues) tab.*
releases.name: 0.0.3 Beta
